description: Fragment from the top of a legal document, likely a marriage contract. On parchment. Dated: Elul 1528 Seleucid = August/September 1217 CE. Mentions the authority of the Nagid. Includes a list of commodities (= the dowry list) with their values, such as 15 dinars. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
